---
title: "model_fitting"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

#now we fit the 2 models (WBA and SBA) and fit them to each dataset & then compare which one "best explains" which (3 datasets:  selfish, balanced, social)

The Simple Bayesian Agent (SBA)
The Weighted Bayesian Agent (WBA)
```{r}

```
